checks.description: No feature value from the target year (t+1) is used at prediction time.
checks.name: no_target_year_feature_used

checks.description: No data from a period after the prediction cutoff is used as a feature.
checks.name: no_future_period_data

checks.description: No feature is marked available without a verified available_at timestamp.
checks.name: no_unverified_available_at

checks.description: The prediction cutoff is never inferred or guessed; it is either verified or unresolvable.
checks.name: no_inferred_cutoff

checks.description: A revised document is never treated as the original; the version available at prediction time is used.
checks.name: no_revision_used_as_original

checks.description: Part 2 does not change any pair's eligibility.
checks.name: no_eligibility_changed

checks.description: All 1200 pairs are preserved in the audit; none are dropped.
checks.name: no_pair_dropped

checks.description: Missing fiscal_year_end values are never filled or guessed; they remain null and the pair's temporal status is unresolvable.
checks.name: missing_fiscal_year_end_not_filled
